basicDetails.schemeName: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Support for Urban Homeless – Uttarakhand

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Support for Urban Homeless” is an initiative under the Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM), implemented by the Nagar Nigam Dehradun under the Department of Urban Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide safe and accessible night shelter facilities to homeless people living under the open sky in urban areas, ensuring they have protection and support at any time.
schemeContent.benefits_md: People living under the open sky are provided with benefits in night shelters.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide safe and accessible night shelter facilities to homeless people living under the open sky in urban areas, ensuring they have protection and support at any time.

children.text: The “Support for Urban Homeless” is an initiative under the Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM), implemented by the Nagar Nigam Dehradun under the Department of Urban Development, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide safe and accessible night shelter facilities to homeless people living under the open sky in urban areas, ensuring they have protection and support at any time.
People living under the open sky are provided with benefits in night shelters.
A person can come and stay in the night shelters established under the municipal body at any time.

applicationProcess.process_md: A person can come and stay in the night shelters established under the municipal body at any time.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. Any person living under the open sky within the municipal areas of Uttarakhand is eligible to stay in a night shelter.

children.text: Any person living under the open sky within the municipal areas of Uttarakhand is eligible to stay in a night shelter.
